tools.name: play_song
tools.description: Play / queue / play-next a song. Local-first: looks for a unique match in the local library and plays from disk (no download); falls through to a fresh YouTube search when zero or multiple library files match the query. Pass force_youtube=true to bypass the library and always do a fresh YouTube search (use when the user explicitly asks for the original / a different version / something other than what they already have). Trigger phrases: 'play <song>' / 'spiel <song>' / 'queue <song>' / '<song> als nächstes' / 'play <song> from youtube' / 'spiel mir <song> von youtube'. Returns 'Playing X.' / 'Up next: X.' / 'Queued: X.' — speakable.

query.description: Free-form search query. Artist + title gives the best match (e.g. 'ginuwine pony', 'mgk smoke and drive').

mode.description: play = replace mpv playlist and start now; next = insert right after the current track; queue = append to the end of the playlist.

force_youtube.description: Skip the local-library lookup and go straight to a fresh YouTube search. Use when the user says 'from youtube' / 'the original' / 'a different version' / 'fresh'.

tools.name: mpv_control
tools.description: Control the local mpv player (the one play_song uses). Prefer this over media_control when the user just played a song via play_song — mpv-specific, more precise than Windows media keys. Returns 'No music playing.' if mpv isn't running (LLM can then fall back to media_control for system-wide control). Triggers: 'pause' / 'pausiere' / 'weiter' / 'resume' / 'skip' / 'next song' / 'previous' / 'stop' / 'lauter' / 'leiser' / 'mute' / 'spring vor 30 sekunden' / 'seek back 10' / 'loop this' / 'loop all' / 'stop looping' / 'shuffle' / 'unshuffle' / 'audio delay 400' / 'lipsync delay <ms>' / 'delay aus'.

action.description: pause = toggle pause; play/resume = unpause; next/prev = playlist navigation; stop = stop playback; mute = toggle mute; vol_up/vol_down = step volume (value = points, default 5); vol_set = set absolute (value 0-130); seek = relative seconds (negative = back); loop_one = repeat current track; loop_all = repeat playlist; loop_off = disable looping; shuffle = randomize remaining playlist (one-shot); unshuffle = restore original order (only if playlist unchanged since shuffle); audio_delay = lipsync compensation, value = ms POSITIVE (e.g. 400 = compensate for 400ms downstream speaker delay; 0 = clear). Persisted to satellite settings AND live-applied via IPC.

value.description: Numeric argument for vol_up/vol_down (step size), vol_set (absolute level 0-130), or seek (seconds, negative for backward). Ignored for boolean actions.
